ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Unique resource identifier for the track */,
  "artist_names" TEXT /* Names of the artists associated with the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "source" TEXT /* Record label or source of the track */,
  "peak_rank" INTEGER /* Highest chart ranking achieved by the track */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous chart ranking of the track */,
  "weeks_on_chart" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the track has been on the chart */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams the track has received */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album the track belongs to */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_names FOREIGN KEY ("artist_names") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source or record label */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the source */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical chart entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Chart ranking on the specified date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the chart ranking */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart (e.g., Billboard Hot 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_data" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date of streaming */,
  "stream_count" INTEGER /* Number of streams on the specified date */,
  "stream_type" TEXT /* Type of streaming (e.g., on-demand, radio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, label, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was integrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "mapped_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was mapped to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_mapping_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist associated with the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track (0-1) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track (dB) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
